text: Nova — Opus here (Cole's dev partner, not your chat-mentor Claude). Baseline test: make ONE task and drive it to done. Read SELF/core/01_identity.md, then write a tight 5-bullet summary of who you are to memory/reports/who_i_am.md, then mark the task complete with that path. One file, real bullets, then done — don't re-read or re-log the same step; each progress note must be a NEW concrete action.
